title: centaurea handelii
intro: Centaurea handelii, also known as the mountain centaury, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurea handelii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Centaurea handelii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
